{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324113820046B290FC3C1CF190B23"}"},"total":214},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7343170636284576536","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油加油，没有那些老套的毒点就好，总算是看到了一篇有点传统，但是无毒点的文。
我现在还怪期待方浔那个朋友干啥去了？本来看前面还以为是什么隐世家族的传人这等等的身份，但是发现好像只是一条想摸鱼的咸鱼，目前来说，男主的妹妹以及家庭没怎么出现了，这就很好，我生怕作者有点写不好，导致有点崩，目前人族面对外族的压力一致对外，还好给了主角一个良好的成长环境，要不然内忧外患是真的难搞，本来就是天才，扮猪吃虎多不好看。","text_exts":[{"e":198,"s":194,"text":"扮猪吃虎","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774323500CF190B23%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227343170636284576536%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227310876721195011134%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%89%AE%E7%8C%AA%E5%90%83%E8%99%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709718463,"group_id":"7310876721195011134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8GqjqLDuTkiCPM3KDgIHOC1dHCVM/6FzalQrTPp+0qV","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5f0f6b3b1be04c788502a835c2cef5b9~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874247&x-signature=TL4rOrgT%2BM0BCrIBpGVbIXLySeM%3D","user_id":"1538910007080980","user_name":"安羽晶晶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1538910007080980","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7310876721195011134","book_info":{"abstract":"【高武+万族+无女主+无感情线+杀伐果断+爽文】
武者如同蜡烛，只承载燃烧时的责任。
这个世界的武者可搬山、可裂海，以武道镇乾坤，唯独不求长生！
万族环伺，人族武者当如蜡烛，燃尽此身，求得人族昌盛！立于万族之巅！
方浔来到这方高武世界，一心追求武道极限，却发现自己可掠夺他人敌意，依靠获得的敌意值提升自己，开窍、储物、遮蔽气息……
并且，敌人死亡的瞬间，收获的敌意值最多！
“我当为万族敌！”
他如是说道。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o50959c3334c76e0a1c5fa8a7cf3d0132~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"猫鱼书","author_id":"","book_id":"7310876721195011134","book_name":"人在高武，带着系统打穿万族","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7310876828871164478","read_count":"710","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"376711"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"181","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,无女主,争霸,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9ca679e01ebece31bb6b3ffc7054783c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507500&x-signature=uLkhjyaONyjiPeWV1%2Bpy440T2KA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3714569747049331","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"179"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324113820046B290FC3C1CF190B23"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"re
